text.title: API Gateway Security Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the api-gateway-security methodology end-to-end.

step.name: tls-baseline
step.action: Set min_version 1.2; lock cipher suites; enable HSTS.
step.decision-gate: If TLS 1.0/1.1 present, block — no exceptions.

step.name: wire-jwt-auth
step.action: Configure JWT verification with issuer + audience + JWKS + algorithm allowlist.

step.name: deny-by-default-authz
step.action: Set default: deny; add explicit allow rules with required scopes per route.
step.decision-gate: If any route has no allow rule, block — explicit choice required.

step.name: secure-headers
step.action: Set HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy, CSP.

step.name: waf-attach
step.action: Attach OWASP Core rule set; start paranoia level 1; tune false positives over 30d.
step.decision-gate: If WAF unavailable, document in posture-audit log and open a follow-up ticket.

step.name: posture-audit
step.action: Run posture audit: cert expiry, JWKS reachability, deny-by-default, no api_key query usage in last 7d access logs.
